entry: Initialized continuity and completed deep review sweep for tasks 0023-0035.
Applied cross-project continuity fixes, workflow migration to .agents, and runtime hardening for todo_enforcer/model_selector/sandbox-launcher.
Completed broad continuity path migration sweep (workflows/toml/templates/docs) to .agents/continuity-<agent-name>.md.
Corrected MCP installer/template pathing, removed deprecated MCP entries (in_memoria/semgrep), reduced Antigravity MCP set, and aligned Codex TOML + README/.env governance updates.
Resolved Gemini skill conflict source, fixed OpenCode MCP schema migration, removed grep_app/web_search MCPs, and filled missing skill descriptions for Codex schema checks.
Optimized Gemini curated agents list to 75 valid entries with Rust specialists and added post-install MCP diagnostics script integrated into install-mcps flow.

Ran iterative MCP install/fix loop on real configs to clean state; removed stale/disconnected servers, added memcord availability gating, and validated clean mcp list outputs for Gemini/OpenCode/Codex.
